title: Creamy Salty Peruvian Quinoa Bowl
description: A velvety quinoa bowl with a salty kick, infused with creamy milk chocolate and bright lime, perfect for an energizing, sugarfree meal.

ingredients.name: milk chocolate
ingredients.notes: dark or semi‑dark for balanced sweetness

instructions: Rinse the quinoa under cold water and drain.
In a medium saucepan, bring 1 cup of water and 1 cup of coconut milk to a gentle boil.
Add the quinoa, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
In another saucepan, gently warm almond milk and melt the milk chocolate over low heat, whisking until smooth.
Stir the chocolate‑almond milk mixture into the cooked quinoa and mix well.
Season with sea salt, black pepper, cumin, and smoked paprika; add lime juice and whisk until combined.
Transfer the quinoa mixture to serving bowls.
Top each bowl with chopped cilantro and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Enjoy the creamy, salty, chocolate‑infused delight!
